case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. EDMUNDO J. ROJAS ROMERO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. ROMERO, EDMUNDO J. ROJAS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY EDMUNDO J. ROJAS ROMERO IS GRANTED. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTEDE BY MARIA ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EDMUNDO ROMERO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFFS CLAIM HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EDMUNDO J. ROJAS ROMERO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, EDMUNDO J. ROJAS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED OCT-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, EDMUNDO J. ROJAS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROMERO, EDMUNDO J. ROJAS HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO, EDMUNDO J. ROJAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00, PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENTS OF $200.00 PER MONTH AND CONTINUING UNTIL PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE A FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WHEN THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FUILL. CASE IS CONTINUED FOR A PROGRESS REPORT ON AUGUST 14, 2018 AT 10:00AM. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE SHALL BE CONTINUED FOR A FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT IN 7 MONTHS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, EDMUNDO J. ROJAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO, EDMUNDO J. ROJAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
